properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: When the storm raged above them The disciples were afraid For the waves were high and the ship was tossed They could not find their way Then they awoke the master Saying lord please save us now He rebuked the winds and the sea grew calm And they all wondered how

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: God sees the storm from the other side He knows the lessons learned And just beyond the clouds he sees clear skies He speaks peace to the raging storm When peace could not be found He already sees the rainbow, when we see only clouds

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Like the man upon the sea did I have called on God in prayer When it seemed to me that All hope was gone and I was in despair Then I remembered what the Lord said When he calmed that troubled sea And I know once more how He sees the storm, and peace floods over me

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: And when the storms of life are crashing in and trouble me I can feel Gods arms around me And He whispers let it be, let it be
